lines.text: addBehaviour("Page contains a heading that does not exist — assertion fails intentionally");

featureMeta.name: AI Failure Analysis
featureMeta.description: As a developer I want failed tests to be analysed by AI

tests.scenarioDescription: Demonstrates AI analysis on an intentionally failing assertion
behaviours: Standard user logs in successfully
Page contains a heading that does not exist — assertion fails intentionally

steps.title: Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('heading', { name: 'Non Existing Header' })
steps.error:
Error: [2mexpect([22m[31mlocator[39m[2m).[22mtoBeVisible[2m([22m[2m)[22m failed

Locator: getByRole('heading', { name: 'Non Existing Header' })
Expected: visible
Timeout: 5000ms
Error: element(s) not found

Call log:
[2m  - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms[22m
[2m  - waiting for getByRole('heading', { name: 'Non Existing Header' })[22m

trends.notes: Trend-ready schema. Persist snapshots externally to compute multi-run trends.

aiAnalyses.testName: › chromium › ui/saucedemo.spec.js › AI Failure Analysis › intentional failure for AI analysis demo @regression
aiAnalyses.summary: The test intentionally attempts to assert visibility of a heading element with the text 'Non Existing Header', which does not exist in the DOM. The assertion fails after the full 5000ms timeout with 'element(s) not found', confirming the element is genuinely absent from the page.
aiAnalyses.likelyRootCause: This is a deliberately introduced test failure for demonstration purposes. The locator `getByRole('heading', { name: 'Non Existing Header' })` targets a heading that was never rendered by the application. The test name explicitly states 'intentional failure for AI analysis demo', confirming this is not an accidental regression but a synthetic failure injected to exercise the AI failure analysis pipeline.
aiAnalyses.suggestedRemediation: Since this is an intentional demo failure, no production fix is required. However, if this test needs to be made green for CI stability, replace the non-existent heading locator with a valid heading that actually appears on the page at line 116 (e.g., the 'Products' heading on the inventory page). If the intent is to keep a failing test as a demo fixture, consider tagging it with `@skip` or placing it in a separate suite excluded from the main regression run to avoid polluting CI results.

structuredFeedback.reasoning: The failure is caused by an assertion targeting a heading ('Non Existing Header') that does not exist in the application's DOM. The element was never present — this is not a timing race or locator drift scenario — the name is intentionally fictitious. The test duration of ~5917ms (slightly over the 5000ms assertion timeout) confirms Playwright waited the full timeout before failing, ruling out any transient timing issue. The root cause is purely the assertion referencing a non-existent element.

The locator `getByRole('heading', { name: 'Non Existing Header' })` targets a heading that was never rendered by the application. The test name explicitly states 'intentional failure for AI analysis demo', confirming this is not an accidental regression but a synthetic failure injected to exercise the AI failure analysis pipeline.",

However, if this test needs to be made green for CI stability, replace the non-existent heading locator with a valid heading that actually appears on the page at line 116 (e.g., the 'Products' heading on the inventory page). If the intent is to keep a failing test as a demo fixture, consider tagging it with `@skip` or placing it in a separate suite excluded from the main regression run to avoid polluting CI results.",

The element was never present — this is not a timing race or locator drift scenario — the name is intentionally fictitious. The test duration of ~5917ms (slightly over the 5000ms assertion timeout) confirms Playwright waited the full timeout before failing, ruling out any transient timing issue. The root cause is purely the assertion referencing a non-existent element.",
    "suggestedPatch": "// Original (line 116) — intentional failure:\nawait expect(page.getByRole('heading', { name: 'Non Existing Header' })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5000 });\n\n// Suggested fix — use a heading that actually exists on the inventory page:\nawait expect(page.getByRole('heading', { name: 'Products' })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5000 });\n\n// Alternative — if the test must remain as a demo fixture, skip it:\ntest.skip(' intentional failure for AI analysis demo @regression', async ({ page }) => {\n  // ...\n});",
    "candidateLocators": [
      "getByRole('heading', { name: 'Products' })",
      "getByRole('heading', { name: 'Swag Labs' })",
      "locator('.title')",
      "locator('[data-test=\"title\"]')"
